ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch of wine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number assigned to the wine */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winery where the wine was produced */,
  "grape_variety" INTEGER /* Type of grape variety used */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid content of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides content of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates content of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "quality1" INTEGER /* Quality rating by evaluator 1 */,
  "quality2" INTEGER /* Quality rating by evaluator 2 */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "fermentation_type" TEXT /* Type of fermentation process used */,
  "aging_period" INTEGER /* Duration the wine was aged (in months) */,
  "bottle_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine was bottled */,
  "production_volume" REAL /* Total volume of the batch produced (in liters) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the wine is stored (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winery_id FOREIGN KEY ("winery_id") REFERENCES wineries ("winery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_grape_variety FOREIGN KEY ("grape_variety") REFERENCES grape_varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wineries" (
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winery */,
  "winery_name" TEXT /* Name of the winery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the winery */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the winery */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the winery was founded */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the winery owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the winery's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the winery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grape_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grape variety */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Region or country of origin for the grape variety */,
  "average_sugar_content" REAL /* Average sugar content of the grape variety (in grams per liter) */,
  "average_acidity" REAL /* Average acidity of the grape variety (in grams per liter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator (e.g., sommelier, wine critic) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the evaluator has */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications or qualifications the evaluator holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch being rated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who rated the wine */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating given to the wine */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was assigned */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments by the evaluator */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating (e.g., 1-10, 1-20) */,
  "rating_method" TEXT /* Method used to rate the wine (e.g., blind tasting, panel review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality control, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
